'''Core Courier Service''',<ref name="Retreat" /> also known as '''Core Couriers''',<ref name="EGTD">''[[The Essential Guide to Droids]]''</ref> was a delivery service during the days of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], serving the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Galactic Core]]. One employee of note was [[Taryn Clancy]], captain of the starship [[Messenger (starship)|''Messenger'']], who, in [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]], evaded the Imperial blockade of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] to bring an important [[Datacard/Legends|datacard]] to the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Fleet]]. [[Del Sato]], Clancy's co-pilot and fellow Core Courier Service employee, retired shortly afterwards.<ref name="Retreat" />
